source_title: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 13 June 2024 laying down harmonised rules on artificial intelligence
summary: The EU AI Act is published in the Official Journal of the European Union. Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 enters into force 20 days later (1 August 2024). Subsequent application dates are staggered: Article 5 prohibitions from 2 February 2025, General-Purpose AI rules from 2 August 2025, governance and penalty provisions from 2 August 2025, high-risk system obligations from 2 August 2026, and high-risk systems placed on the market before 2 August 2026 from 2 August 2027 (per Article 113).
mechanical_change: Adoption and publication of the full regulation text. Establishes risk-based categorisation (prohibited, high-risk, limited-risk, minimal-risk), obligations for providers and deployers, conformity assessment procedures, post-market monitoring, and penalties up to EUR 35 million or 7% of global annual turnover.

impact_on_regula_patterns.notes: Baseline — all Regula patterns are calibrated against this version of the text.
